name: Obsidian Vault Bridge (WASM)
description: Export and sync entity markdown to an Obsidian vault with wikilinks, tags, and relationship graphs preserved.
author: BiloxiStudios

vault_path.label: Obsidian Vault Path
vault_path.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian vault root

auto_export.label: Auto-export on Save
auto_export.description: Automatically export entities to the vault when they are saved

include_images.label: Include Images
include_images.description: Copy entity images to the vault's attachments folder

link_style.label: Link Style
link_style.description: How to format cross-references: wikilink ([[Name]]) or markdown ([Name](path))

folder_per_type.label: Folder Per Entity Type
folder_per_type.description: Organize exported files into subfolders by entity type (Characters/, Factions/, etc.)
